findings.title: Required registry fields were declaration-only in the validator
findings.disposition: Added a validator loop that asserts CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY exposes each declared required_registry_fields entry at runtime.

findings.title: Declared export modules were not existence-checked on disk
findings.disposition: Added validator checks that packages/control-plane/src/model.js, states.js, and registry.js all exist for the declared export_modules list.

findings.title: Layout constant hardcodes status production_ready before closeout completion
findings.disposition: This is an established RP00 control-plane convention and is cross-checked against the contract status and closeout evidence before validator pass.

findings.title: Mixed import indentation in model.test.js
findings.disposition: Normalized the affected import lines to two-space indentation and reran focused model tests plus git diff --check.

findings.title: S01 evidence artifacts must exist before production_ready
findings.disposition: Evidence artifacts are materialized in the S01 evidence root and verified by npm run rp00:control-plane:validate.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S01 package layout slice as scope-compliant: it opens only the ControlPlaneExportModelRegistry package layout, declares model.js/states.js/registry.js export modules, declares required export groups and required registry fields, defers identifier and tenant scope to RP00.P01.M09.S02/S03, does not mutate states.js or the entity registry, uses no real data, writes no product state, and hands off to RP00.P01.M09.S02. No P0/P1 findings were reported. P2-1 and P3-1/P3-3 were fixed; P3-2 is accepted as an existing status convention.
